summary: Claim C-007 referenced rejected source ID R-001, but rejected.jsonl had no source_id fields.
root_cause: The transition gate required source references to exist but did not explicitly validate both accepted and rejected source registers for unique IDs.
run_repair: Added R-001 through R-004 to rejected.jsonl and revalidated all BRONS claim source references.
system_change: Add mandatory cross-register referential-integrity validation to the continuous-learning protocol and quality gate.

summary: ZILVER blocked solely because the main branch advanced beyond the pinned source_commit, even though pinned BRONS input blobs had not changed.
root_cause: Execution Protocol v2.1 conflated branch-head advancement with material drift of required inputs.
run_repair: Synchronized state/events and amended ZILVER_CONTEXT.yaml to allow independent branch-head advancement when every pinned required-file blob SHA still matches.
system_change: Define source_commit as an immutable input snapshot reference and block only on required-file drift, truncation, missing files, desynchronization or a valid claim.
